mapper.select: SELECT task_id AS "id",project_id AS "projectId",work_order_id AS "workOrderId",workflow_instance_id AS "workflowInstanceId",stage_instance_id AS "stageInstanceId",workflow_node_instance_id AS "workflowNodeInstanceId",workflow_node_id AS "workflowNodeId",stage_code AS "stageCode",task_type AS "taskType",task_kind AS "taskKind",priority,status,next_run_at AS "nextRunAt",claimed_by AS "claimedBy",claimed_at AS "claimedAt",started_at AS "startedAt",completed_at AS "completedAt",version,created_at AS "createdAt",updated_at AS "updatedAt" FROM tsk_task WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND work_order_id=#{workOrderId} AND (created_at,task_id)>(#{cursorCreatedAt},#{cursorId}) ORDER BY created_at,task_id LIMIT #{fetchSize}
